# Happy Endpoint API Documentation

Happy Endpoint sells data APIs on RapidAPI. This documentation site contains API guides and statically generated endpoint reference pages for every OpenAPI operation.

Main guides:
- Credits: /credits/
- Status Codes: /status-codes/
- Usage: /usage/
- Global Parameters: /global-parameters/
- Best Practices: /best-practices/
- Error Handling: /error-handling/
- Timeouts: /timeouts/
- API Keys: /api-keys/
- Glossary: /glossary/

API references:
- Sephora API: /sephora/
- Tesco API: /tesco/
- IKEA API: /ikea/
- PropertyFinder API: /propertyfinder/
- Bayut API: /bayut/
- Priceline API: /priceline/

Each API endpoint has its own canonical URL under /{api}/{endpoint}/.
